typography.strategy: High contrast brutalist typography. Massive, tight-tracking uppercase headings to convey automotive performance and aggression.

layout_and_spacing.strategy: Generous spacing. Bento grid or large distinct columns for the 3 catalog items to give them premium focus. No clutter.
layout_and_spacing.components: Go cardless or use sharp-edged layouts with 1px solid borders (border-white/10). No soft shadows.

motion_and_interaction.strategy: Sleek, automotive feel. Micro-interactions like slight scaling on hover. Use glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60) for sticky header.

hero_background.description: Close-up of a black snake coiled, to be used as a dark textured background overlay in the hero section with low opacity (e.g. bg-black/80).

wheels.name: Viper Venom - Forged Series
wheels.description: Jante forjada de alta performance em preto acetinado.

wheels.name: Viper Strike - Alloy Series
wheels.description: Design agressivo multi-raio em cinza titânio.

wheels.name: Viper Fang - Track Series
wheels.description: Ultra-leve para máxima performance em pista.

decorative_snake.description: Blue viper on black background, MUST be filtered to grayscale (filter: grayscale(100%)) to match the Black/White/Gray theme and used as an aggressive visual element.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a premium dark-mode visual catalog landing page for 'Catálogo Viper'.
Strictly adhere to the requested color palette: White, Gray, and Black. Use the typography 'Cabinet Grotesk' for aggressive automotive headings.
Include a Hero section with the black snake image (pexels-photo-15466191) as a background overlay. Apply a heavy dark overlay (e.g., bg-black/80) so text pops effortlessly.
Implement a dedicated catalog section specifically showcasing 3 wheels/rims ('jantes') using the provided wheel images.
Use pure HTML/Tailwind for the layout to create an asymmetrical or premium structural layout. Avoid generic card components. Use sharp 1px borders with border-white/10.
Ensure all copy is in Portuguese as requested (e.g., 'Catálogo Viper', 'Jantes de Alta Performance').
No contact forms or transactional UI. This is purely a visual showcase.
Apply 'filter: grayscale(100%)' to any decorative snake images (like the blue viper image) to perfectly preserve the strict Black/Gray/White color palette.
Use Phosphor Icons or Lucide-React for UI icons.
Include data-testid on any navigation or interactive element.
